meta.source: Finviz 20-year backtest + DNA formula review (Grok Risk Officer + principal insights)
meta.purpose: RAG-retrievable steel guardrail. Must be surfaced by any local retriever (LlamaIndex/Chroma/Aider) or cross-review prompt when touching scoring, backtest, DNA, fom, rally_signal, or signal generators. Prevents survivor bias, tail overfitting, and invalid top-calling in automated evolution of the system.
meta.core_philosophy: 不抄最低點、買修復確認、破月線就降槓桿、靠觸發不靠信仰。Dynamic model + probability, evidence-gated, no subjective prediction.

overfitting_guards.title: Single-position max realized gain smoothing (Winsorization) for EV and scoring
overfitting_guards.rule: In any FOM / DNA / backtest expectation calculation or optimizer, cap the contribution of any single ticker's realized gain at +500%. Extreme tails (examples from history: AXTI ~+4907%, RKLB ~+2214%) must be clipped for robustness testing.
overfitting_guards.rationale: System +20.5% avg per trade was almost entirely supported by two lotto-style tail events. This is classic survivor / tail bias. Without clipping, future optimizers (Aider, RL, or manual) will chase the exact features of those two names and overfit.
enforcement_points: backtest/ code and any fom-backtest-*.json generators
Any script that computes '超額收益' or strategy expectancy
overfitting_guards.test: Re-run the 20y Finviz DNA recipe with +500% cap — does win-rate and expectancy remain positive and stable?

overfitting_guards.title: TD-9 (magic nine) asymmetry — BUY only, SELL forbidden
overfitting_guards.rule: TD-9 / Demark TD-9 SELL (or 'sell-9', 'nine sell setup') signals are HARD DISABLED everywhere. No code path may generate a short or exit signal purely from TD-9 sell count. Exit / de-risk logic may ONLY use: rejection bar (price action confirmation) + break of monthly moving average (e.g. monthly MA10 or equivalent trailing confirmation) + the existing '破月線就降槓桿' rule.
overfitting_guards.rationale: Backtest data confirms buy-9 (抄底) delivers ~2x baseline EV. sell-9 (逃頂) is ineffective or noise. Any sell-9 trigger is anti-reflexive top-guessing and violates the '靠觸發不靠信仰' + no subjective prediction principle.
enforcement_points: fom_alpha, ma_scanner, or custom signal modules
All wiki/05_recommendations and outputs/picks-*.json generation paths
overfitting_guards.test: Grep entire src/ + wiki/ for any 'TD-9.*SELL' or 'sell.*9' trigger that is not wrapped in a disabled comment or routed exclusively to rejection+MA logic.

additional_rag_contracts: Always surface philosophy/09-point-in-time.md and raw/ immutability rule on any data-layer or backtest review.
Cross-review reports (outputs/cross-review/) and wiki/log.md entries are first-class retrieval sources for historical discipline.
When reviewing Finviz / DNA / fom changes, the retriever MUST pull this file + the two guards above.
Enforce 03-long-short-taxonomy.md four-quadrant routing on every signal: 2 long_new (genuine bull only), 2 short_new (genuine bear or sentiment-bull via Put-only), 6 position_followup. No padding.

TD-9 (concepts/td-9-sequential.md) volume-validation guard is mandatory: volume contracting + sentiment peak = true exhaustion (short/trim); volume expanding + fundamental validation = continuation (hold/ignore TD-9).

No p-hacking: LLM strategy generation must be constrained to hyperparameter ranges only; never rewrite core quant logic. Validation must use Combinatorial Purged Cross-Validation (CPCV), not single-axis walk-forward. Any backtest-driven rewrite loop is forbidden.

Crypto high-freq (weekend or mode-switch) MUST use ccxt_client.py (public Websocket/REST, read-only, no keys) for orderbook + OHLCV. yfinance/Polygon/Finnhub are insufficient for crypto L2/orderbook imbalance.
